## Studio
<!-- Which studio? Games / Stories / Music / Art / Science / Tinker -->

## Pattern Name
<!-- e.g., "Tower Defense", "Rhythm Game", "Circuit Simulator" -->

## Description
<!-- What does this pattern generate? How does the child interact with it? -->

## Example Prompt
<!-- What would a child say to trigger this? e.g., "make a rhythm game with drums" -->

## Age Considerations
<!-- How should this adapt for 5-6 vs 7-8 vs 9-10? -->

## Technical Notes
<!-- Any Canvas/Audio/DOM patterns needed? Performance considerations? -->
